---

### I. | PURPOSE

To define how your creative system becomes a **sustainable economy**—supporting artistic expression, modular tools, educational access, and long-term income through codified, transparent, remixable formats.

---

### II. | OUTPUT FORMATS + BUSINESS USES

| OUTPUT TYPE | FORMAT | BUSINESS USE |
|---------------------|----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Narrative Projects | Books, Zines, Podcasts, Essays | Direct sales, Patreon, audience subscriptions |
| Tools & Apps | Wordcut tools, Ritual planners | Indie creators, niche creative markets |
